name: Mushroom and Kale Frittata
snippet: What comes to mind when you think of brunch?  For me, it is usually an omelet or frittata.  I love egg dishes because you can pretty much add any vegetables or protein you desire and they still turn out delicious.  This time I opted for a meatless frittata.  I had just picked up some kale from the farmer’s market and I knew I wanted to incorporate it so I decided to go with a vegetable version.  I love the combination of kale and mushroom and with the sweetness from the potatoes, the flavors were perfectly balanced!
